Terminals

6 reviewed packages available for Terminals.

Alacritty

alacritty

Cross-platform OpenGL terminal emulator.

  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • Linux
  • macOS
  • Windows

iTerm2

iterm2

Feature-rich terminal emulator for macOS.

  • macOS

kitty

kitty

GPU-accelerated terminal emulator with advanced layout features.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • Linux
  • macOS

tmux

tmux

Terminal multiplexer for persistent sessions and split panes.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • openSUSE

WezTerm

wezterm

GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer.

  • Linux
  • macOS
  • Windows

Windows Terminal

windows-terminal

Modern terminal application for command-line tools and shells on Windows.

  • Windows

Catalog 2026.07.13.1 · bundled development fixture; CLI authentication is authoritative

Source and releases (configured by the deploying repository) · No runtime backend
